series_metadata.series_description: To record and track the log in and log out of visitors to certain restricted areas within the Ohio State Highway Patrol(e.g., Central Records, GHQ Facility, Crime Lab, Intelligence Unit, etc.) on a Visitor Log form, OHP0151.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for one year plus current, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain for one year plus current, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
